data.raceComments: {"comment":"10. OFF THE SCALE took a solid step forward second-up at Scone, racing handy and sticking on gamely for third over 1600m. He typically hits her peak form around this stage of her prep, and the rise to 1890m looks ideal. Rory Hutchings replacing an apprentice is a positive, and she is ready to win again at short notice. 4. CAVALRY was dominant when breaking his maiden here last start, settling just off the speed before putting them away with authority by 3 lengths. This is tougher, but he is still lightly raced from the Hawkes stable, and they know how to place their team to advantage. Go again. 13. LUPA CAPITOLINA is another last-start maiden winner with only five runs under her belt, and she is bred to have plenty of improvement to come. With any luck from a wide gate, she can run into the top 4 at some decent odds.","runners":[10,4,13],"exclusive":true}
